_note: NPC Interjection System (BG3-style). These are data-only definitions. Processing requires narrative_engine.gd to check for matching interjections when advancing dialogue nodes: on each node transition, scan this array for entries whose trigger_dialogue and trigger_node match, evaluate conditions, and if met, insert the interjection text as a temporary dialogue line before continuing.

text: Elara steps forward from behind you. 'I can confirm the nightcap root. I tested it myself. Three times. Whoever did this knew exactly what they were doing.'
Voss places her hand on her sword hilt. Not drawing — just resting. 'Before you answer, stranger — my company is watching. Twenty swords. Whatever you decide, we're part of the equation now.'
A voice from the doorway. Old Maren, leaning on her staff, blind eyes fixed on Ashworth. 'My son. You're talking about my son. Say his name. Say SILAS.'
